title: Silver Wire-Wrapped Raw Amethyst Ring
description: A raw, deep purple amethyst crystal clustered and hand-wrapped with solid sterling silver wire. Each ring exhibits the unique natural geometry of the crystal specimen, making it a completely one-of-a-kind statement piece.

title: Delicate Emerald Pendant Necklace
description: A brilliant-cut green emerald solitaire gemstone, delicately set in a 14k yellow gold four-prong basket. Suspended from an ultra-fine 16-inch gold chain, this elegant piece captures light with every movement.
main_image_alt: Delicate emerald pendant necklace in 14k gold

title: Hand-Carved Obsidian Drop Earrings
description: Polished natural obsidian drops, meticulously faceted by hand. Fitted with hypoallergenic sterling silver ear hooks, these earrings offer a sleek, reflective dark finish that complements any classic wardrobe.
main_image_alt: Faceted obsidian drop earrings on a stand
